sha_binding.verified_source_note: Implementation commit: emit per-phase ingestor loop progress (heartbeat.ts progress metadata + shouldWatchdogForceExit; ingestor-runner.ts per-phase recordProgress; index.ts progress-driven watchdog) plus tests in apps/ingestor/src. Squash-merged to main as 2b50bf59 (PR #1037).

pnpm_verify.note: env:check, lint, type-check (project references), build, and the full unit suite all green — '[verify:parallel] all checks passed'.

cases: UTV2-1286: progress is emitted per-league and per-phase, not once per cycle (league-start + league-end for every league, plus cycle/finalized-repoll phases)
UTV2-1286: a slow-but-progressing cycle never trips the watchdog (total wall-clock >> threshold, each per-phase gap < threshold)
UTV2-1286: a true no-progress wedge still trips the watchdog (no progress past the bound -> force-exit)
writeHeartbeat -> readHeartbeat round-trips the new progress fields (phase, league, lastProgressAt); pre-change files still round-trip to {ts,cycle,pid}
existing resilience tests (transient cycle-level DB failure does not kill the loop; throwing hook never breaks the loop; bounded re-admission) updated to the new hook signature and still green

live_db_smoke.note: Executed pnpm test:db against live Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm — 7/7 pass (~119s). Read-only; this change adds no schema and no new writes — it only changes the in-process loop-progress liveness signal that drives the watchdog and container healthcheck.

runtime_proof.command: focused reproduction tests + pure watchdog-decision tests (post-deploy live assertion pending merge + deploy)
runtime_proof.note: The regression is reproduced and the fix proven by deterministic tests: a slow-but-progressing cycle whose total wall-clock far exceeds the 20-min watchdog threshold never trips the watchdog because each per-phase progress gap stays under the bound, while a true no-progress wedge still trips it. Per-league/per-phase emission is asserted against runIngestorCycles. The live post-deploy assertion runs after this PR merges and deploys.

queries.description: Per-phase progress emission across a real cycle (no false-positive surface)
queries.result_summary: league-start + league-end emitted for MLB and NBA, plus cycle-start/finalized-repoll-start/finalized-repoll-end/cycle-end; >= 6 progress signals per cycle (regression was exactly 1) — PASS

queries.description: Slow-but-progressing cycle does not trip the watchdog
queries.result_summary: 30 phases × 4-min gaps (2h total, >> 20-min threshold) — shouldWatchdogForceExit false at every check — PASS

queries.description: True no-progress wedge still trips the watchdog
queries.result_summary: no progress past the threshold -> shouldWatchdogForceExit true; exactly-at-threshold still alive — PASS

queries.description: Read-only live baseline (Supabase zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm) at lane close — confirms the ingestor loop is making progress (offers advancing) pre-deploy of the watchdog fix
queries.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_offer_history WHERE snapshot_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
queries.result_summary: 55409 provider_offer_history rows in the last 24h — the loop is cycling and persisting offers; the watchdog fix removes the false-positive restarts that were interrupting it

row_counts.note: offers advancing — ingestor loop is cycling; watchdog fix stops false-positive restarts interrupting it
no offers in the trailing 10m window at close time (off-peak / between cycles); post-deploy proof confirms steady advance
latest created_at 2026-06-14 — game_results frozen 8d; this is the SEPARATE UTV2-1287 blocker (events not transitioning to completed), not addressed by this lane
155 MLB; historical completions exist but recent ones are not producing fresh game_results — tracked by the follow-up results-ingestion lane

live_production_proof.observed: Static proof complete: the watchdog now force-exits only on a true no-progress wedge, not on a slow-but-advancing cycle. Per-phase progress bounds the inter-progress gap to a single phase (<= leagueTimeoutMs, default 240s), well under the 20-min watchdog threshold.
live_production_proof.deferred: Post-deploy proof (read-only) after merge + deploy: exactly one ingestor container; container healthcheck OK; restart count stabilizes with no further watchdog false-positive exits in logs; the loop keeps advancing through phases; MLB provider offers continue advancing.
live_production_proof.production_mutation: none — in-process liveness signal change only; no schema, no new writes, no data backfill, no fabricated picks
